title: pelecyphora minima
intro: Pelecyphora minima, also known as the dwarf pincushion cactus, is a small, globular cactus species native to Mexico. The plant contains flavonoids and saponins with potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Research suggests that Pelecyphora minima may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, although more studies are needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
